title: Runtime Layer Schema
description: Manages execution, state, runtime behavior, and execution-time control of knowledge blocks

engine.description: Execution engine or orchestration system used at runtime

parallel_execution.description: Whether execution may run in parallel

execution_window.description: Allowed time window for execution or re-execution

human_review_required.description: Whether human review is required before execution

execution_control.description: Deterministic controls applied at execution time before an action is allowed

requires_revalidation.description: Whether decision state must be revalidated before execution

authority_mode.description: How strictly authority checks are enforced at runtime

delta_threshold.description: Maximum tolerated drift between decision-time state and execution-time state

evidence_freshness_window.description: Maximum allowed age of supporting evidence before revalidation is required

block_on_policy_mismatch.description: Whether execution must be blocked when current policy differs from decision-time policy

fail_behavior.description: System behavior when execution control checks fail

allowed_actions.description: Actions explicitly allowed under the current execution policy

prohibited_actions.description: Actions explicitly prohibited under the current execution policy

audit_log_required.description: Whether execution decisions and outcomes must be logged

revalidation.description: Rules governing execution-time revalidation against live conditions

compare_context.description: Revalidate current context against decision-time context

compare_policy.description: Revalidate current policy constraints against decision-time policy

compare_inputs.description: Revalidate current inputs against decision-time inputs

compare_risk_posture.description: Revalidate current risk posture against decision-time risk posture

compare_evidence.description: Revalidate supporting evidence for freshness and continued validity

on_mismatch.description: Behavior when revalidation detects a mismatch

risk_posture.description: Runtime risk profile used to determine whether execution remains acceptable

impact.description: Potential severity if execution fails or produces harm

likelihood.description: Estimated probability of a negative outcome

uncertainty.description: Confidence penalty representing uncertainty in the estimate

system_state.description: Current system environment in which execution is occurring

exposure_window.description: How long the effect of the action may persist

max_allowed_score.description: Maximum allowed risk score for execution to proceed
